name: Balanced Professional
input:
I want stable career growth,
        decent salary,
        good work-life balance,
        and low stress.

name: Aggressive Ambition
input:
I want maximum salary,
        rapid promotion,
        and I am willing to work very hard.

name: Burnout Sensitive
input:
I previously burned out badly.
        I want flexibility,
        low stress,
        and psychological stability.

name: Conflicting Priorities
input:
I want very high salary,
        but also extremely low stress,
        maximum flexibility,
        and fast promotions.
